code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if has
      let v = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
    has = true
  else if b == 43 and not has
    has = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let count = list.len(nums)
mut out = ""
mut max_so_far = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  let x = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    max_so_far = x
  else if x > max_so_far
    max_so_far = x
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{max_so_far}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{max_so_far}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
